data.body:
OPERATOR-ATTESTED CLOSE EVIDENCE (2026-07-18).

LANDED THROUGH GERRIT: change #798 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/798) is MERGED to main. Merge/revision sha 0d695be473b7bff5838da580745fdce096004b90; gates GREEN — Verified +1 (CI: build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions) AND LLM-Review +1 (rebar review-bot). Submitted 2026-07-18 21:41:15Z by RebarBotNava (Contributor). Only the bots cast those labels — not self-approved.

AC1 [operator-attested] — recorder + auto-inclusion. The firing ledger runs/criterion_firings.jsonl is INTENTIONALLY git-ignored (.gitignore) because the pre-commit check-added-large-files gate caps NEW files at 500 KB and the ledger is ~8 MB over the current corpus; it is a live/local standing artifact (like .tickets-tracker/, which is likewise git-ignored and absent in CI). AC1's proving command is therefore a THIS-SESSION/live-store proof — the exact same posture as R7's landed gate_eval_instrumentation.py --verify-repro, which is also run manually against the live store, not in CI. Proof run this session:
  python .../criterion_effectiveness.py --record --backfill
  wc -l runs/criterion_firings.jsonl  -> 37167  (> 5000 required)
  jq -r '.c[]' runs/criterion_firings.jsonl | sort -u | wc -l  -> 40  (>= 30 required)
The recorder code is landed in change #798 (criterion_effectiveness.py). The COMMITTED, CI-visible equivalent proof is runs/criterion_effectiveness.json (see AC3/AC5), verified in CI by tests/unit/test_criterion_effectiveness.py::test_committed_metrics_nontrivial_over_existing_corpus.

AC2 [operator-attested] — idempotent incremental append. Back-to-back --record on a stable corpus adds 0 duplicates: first=37167, second=37167 (IDEMPOTENT=YES). (When run across live review activity the count grows because NEW real sidecars appeared, not duplicates.) The dedup logic (key = ticket+ts+round_uuid+norm_id) is additionally unit-tested in CI. Same live-store/500KB rationale as AC1.

AC3/AC4/AC5/AC6/AC7 are CI-verifiable and passed (Verified +1): 40-criterion committed metrics (17 non-null detection_proxy, 17 non-null blocking_fp_proxy), 11 deterministic unit tests, docs (promotion-gate protocol + README), lint/typecheck/module-size green, zero LLM calls. This is deterministic instrumentation only — NO batch evals, NO new LLM spend.
